content.en:
"It turns out that there are other invincible true ancestors in Black Wind Mountain!"

Ye Tian muttered.

That's right, such a powerful Black Wind Mountain, and the background is so profound, how could it be that there was only an invincible true ancestor before!

There was a Ferris general who stopped the Zixia Sect's Zichi True Ancestor, and the Huangguang True Ancestor completely lost his assistance, and finally couldn't hold on under Ye Tian's repeated attacks.

Bang!

Huang Guang True Ancestor's body was completely shattered, and his soul also escaped, which could be regarded as a complete fall and death.

And Huangguang True Ancestor is not the only one who has fallen, the large army of the Zixia Sect has not yet arrived, after all, it takes time to gather the army, many True Ancestors are still in retreat, it takes a lot of time just to notice, and they can't catch up at all for a while.

Therefore, the 100,000 True Ancestors of the Zixia Sect in this space were under a lot of pressure, and those Supreme True Ancestors were under even greater pressure, and they were often besieged by many Supreme True Ancestors.

In a short period of time, the Zixia Sect fell three Supreme True Ancestors.

Seeing this scene, Zi Chi True Ancestor and Zi Gang True Ancestor were extremely resentful, but they couldn't change the ending.

With the fall of a large number of true ancestors of the Zixia Sect, the large army of the Zixia Sect finally arrived.

I saw that Leo True Ancestor led a large number of True Ancestors to descend and fight with the True Ancestor army of Black Wind Mountain, and from time to time in the void, True Ancestors fell down, and the battlefield was very tragic.

Since there was no one to contain Ye Tian, the invincible true ancestor, Ye Tian swept almost everything and killed a large number of Zixia Sect True Ancestors.

Gradually, the army of the True Ancestors of the Zixia Sect showed signs of defeat, and many True Ancestors did not dare to fight, only thinking about escaping.

According to this trend, even if the true ancestors of the Zixia Sect were all killed in battle, they would not be able to keep this ancient ruin.

"Give up, you Zixia Sect can't keep this ancient ruin!"

The Ferris general persuaded.

"Impossible!" said the Purple Crimson True Ancestor angrily.

It has been fighting until this time, and the Zixia Sect has fallen so many True Ancestors, how can it be possible to give up, once it is given up, there will be nothing.

Moreover, the Zixia Sect also knew very well that Black Wind Mountain was completely a bandit force, and it was impossible to even cooperate.

Otherwise, they would be willing to share some of the benefits to Black Wind Mountain.

But they know very well that what Black Wind Mountain wants is not one or two percent of the benefits, but everything.

This is the usual style of Black Wind Mountain!

Half an hour later, the battle continued.

At this time, General Blood, Ye Tian, and General Motian all felt that something was wrong.

The losses of the Zixia Sect are very large, and if they continue to fight, the foundation is almost gone.

It stands to reason that the Zixia Sect must definitely give up, even if there is a great opportunity, it must be discarded.

But the Zixia Sect is still insisting, and the Zichi True Ancestor and the Zigang True Ancestor still haven't given up, this is not normal!

"Be careful!"

The generals of the Black Wind Mountain said to each other.

Suddenly.

The sky of this domain debris space completely cracked, stretching for tens of thousands of miles.

Bang!!!!

A huge battleship tore through the void and descended, attracting the attention of all the True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain.

There is a huge sword word on the battleship, and this sword word is full of the meaning of the supreme sword, and it is the word engraved by the ancestor of the supreme sword.

Many forces have the word sword in their names, but the force that dares to engrave only the word sword on the battleship is only one among the three heavenly forces in the domain realm.

"Heavenly Sword Sect!"

The Heavenly Sword Sect is not a sevenfold heavenly force, but a top-notch eightfold heavenly force, and it has several eightfold heavenly dao ancestors, and its strength is extremely powerful.

Obviously, the Heavenly Sword Sect intervened!

"Black Wind Mountain, you guys have gone too far!"

A figure came from the battleship.

Immediately, a sword light stabbed and rescued a fallen Supreme True Ancestor, and a sword shook the three Supreme True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain.

Wow!

A young man in a white robe walked out, his clothes were engraved with golden sword lines, and there was a small sword mark on his eyebrows.

This mark represents the identity of the True Inheritance of the Heavenly Sword Sect, not an ordinary True Ancestor disciple.

"Heavenly Sword Sect, Changfeng Sword Venerable, one of the three Heavenly Sword True Legends, why did your Heavenly Sword Sect interfere?" the Bloody General asked.

Most of the disciples of the Heavenly Sword Sect are not known as the True Ancestor, the Heavenly Monarch level is the Sword Monarch, the True Monarch level is the Sword King, and the True Ancestor level is the Sword Venerable.

Taking the sword as the title is the habit of the Heavenly Sword Sect.

And Changfeng Sword Venerable is also an invincible true ancestor, and his reputation is no less than that of the bloody general.

It's just that the name of the Bloody General is notoriety and murderous, while the name of the Changfeng Sword Venerable is a good name, and it is the idol and target of countless kendo cultivators.

Of course.

For ordinary True Ancestors, whether it is the Changfeng Sword Venerable or the Bloody General, they are all unprovoked existences, and once provoked, they will die.

Changfeng Sword Venerable opened his mouth and said: "There is no way, the Zixia Sect is willing to share half of the benefits of this branch of the Nine Shadows Sect with us, our Heavenly Sword Sect is naturally interested, so we have to come!"

"Heavenly Sword Sect, if you interfere, you will be the enemy of our Black Wind Mountain, and you will only benefit fifty percent, be careful to let your Heavenly Sword Sect suffer heavy losses!"

The bloody general said.

"Hahaha, even if there are heavy losses, there is no way, who made the things inside this ruin too amazing!" Changfeng Sword Venerable said with a smile.

He didn't expect that the Zixia Sect would actually find the ruins of the branch of the Nine Shades Sect, and also found the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool.

The Nine Shadows Sect, that was the Nine Heavens force of a dark era in the ancient era, and it was a powerful force that had participated in the struggle for the position of the realm lord.

Although the Nine Shadows Sect was defeated in the final battle for the position of Realm Lord, the Nine Heavens Force is the Nine Heavens Force, and it is far from being comparable to the Eight Heavens Forces.

Moreover, the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool is only owned by the Nine Shades Sect, and it has long been extinct now.

Once the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool is obtained, the strength of the Heavenly Sword Sect will inevitably grow again, and it is nothing to sacrifice some True Ancestors for this.

The Blood Demon General also guessed that the Heavenly Sword Sect knew about the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, otherwise he would not let the Heavenly Sword Sect participate in such a battle.

In this case, a war between the two sides is inevitable.

On the surface, if the Zixia Sect and the Heavenly Sword Sect are united, the Black Wind Mountain will fall to the downside, but in fact, it will ......

"Heavenly Sword Sect, you have never known about our Black Wind Mountain!"

The bloody general said.

"Oh, what do you mean?"

Changfeng Sword Venerable frowned.

"Since your Heavenly Sword Sect is also over, let's fight!"

With a wave of his hand, the void cracked, and a legion stepped out.

This legion is the bloody army of the bloody general, and it once followed the bloody general to the vast sea realm.

"Your Blood Demon Army is still there, how is it possible, how can you Black Wind Mountain keep so many True Ancestors?"

Changfeng Sword Venerable was shocked.

When any of the Upper Triple Heaven forces is shuttling through the Dark Forbidden Domain, they also try their best to protect the places with relatively high talents, and some disciples with poor talents and disciples with weak cultivation should give up.

There is no way, the Dark Forbidden Domain is too terrifying, if all of them are protected, the forces of the Upper Triple Heavens will collapse, and once it collapses, everyone will have to die.

But he never expected that the bloody army of the bloody general was still there.

This group of bloody troops has the true soul of the bloody army, and they are the bloody army that has experienced countless battles, not the bloody army that has just been cultivated.

At its peak, the Bloodshatter Legion had six Supreme True Ancestors, dozens of Top True Ancestors, and 100,000 True Ancestors.

That's right, it's just the power of a legion!

And now, the bloody demon army that appeared was a little weaker, but it also had four Supreme True Ancestors, thirty-five top True Ancestors, and more than six True Ancestors.

The Bloody Demon Legion is completely a private force belonging to the Bloody General, so its status in the Black Wind Mountain is not high, and the Black Wind Mountain Peak mostly protects the Bloody Demon General, those peak masters, and ordinary True Ancestors.

If the bloody general wants to keep his legion, he can only rely on himself to protect it.

An invincible true ancestor, he is also an ant in front of the dark forbidden realm!

How could he still protect so many True Ancestors?

Not normal, not realistic!

Changfeng Sword Venerable gritted his teeth, it was hard to believe in this scene.

In fact, he also has many followers and a large number of subordinates, but during the journey in the Dark Forbidden Realm, he gave up almost all of his subordinates just to save his life and not let his foundation be damaged.

Therefore, seeing that the bloody general still has so many subordinates, he is jealous!

However, the appearance of the Bloody Legion is only a prologue!

Bang!!!!

Another legion is tearing through the void and descending, and it is the Ferris Legion, subordinate to the Ferris General.

Subsequently, one army after another came, all of them were the legions of many Black Wind Mountain generals, the number was more or less, but when added together, it was a very exaggerated number.

Moreover, the legion battles are all military formations, because of the tacit cooperation, the threat is very great.

For example, the Bloody Demon Legion under the command of the Bloody Demon General has a record of killing an invincible True Ancestor, although it is a very ordinary Invincible True Ancestor, but it is also terrifying.
